description:
Install solar panels exclusively on the upper (low-slope) roof faces of a Dutch Colonial gambrel building using the Skelion plugin in SketchUp.

Instructions:
1. The model is pre-loaded with a gambrel roof building.
2. Open Skelion and set the project location to Lancaster, PA (Latitude ~40.04, Longitude ~-76.31).
3. Set the solar panel dimensions to 992 mm width by 1960 mm height.
4. Insert solar panels ONLY on the two upper (low-slope, ~25°) roof faces.
5. Do NOT place any panels on the two lower (steep, ~60°) roof faces. The steep faces should remain completely empty.
6. When finished, save the model to 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\gambrel_roof_solar.skp' overwriting the existing file.
